body:
Good morning, Alexandra friends! Happy Fri-Yay! Supposed to have a 2nd winter storm this weekend. 😮 I didn’t think that was allowed here in the south! Poking at a new sapphic yearning story concept for today. We’ll see how it shakes out.

Yesterday’s story was one of my favs. And it seems like quite a few of ya’ll loved it too, which makes me happy! 🖤

Not a lot exciting going on today outside of the day job and dashing tonight. Although, my fiancée’s dad is getting out of the hospital today, so they will staying with him all weekend. So if anyone is interested in keeping me nice and toasty warm while snowed in all weekend, I’m accepting applications! 🤣

I hope everyone has a great day today! 🖤🖤🖤
